source: Example only. Copy to release/mobile-native-observation.local.json after EAS/native E2E/store-console checks. Never paste EAS tokens, store credentials, artifact URLs, signing keys, service accounts, reviewer passwords, console payloads, or logs.

android.note: Set booleans true only after Android production AAB, native E2E, and Google Play dry-run proof is verified without secrets.

ios.note: Set booleans true only after iOS production build and App Store dry-run proof is verified without secrets.
